meaning: n.上涌 上升流(指海水由较深层上升到较浅层的过程)
examples: There are those which sit over isolated 'hotspots' of upwelling magma from deep in the earth, like the volcanoes of Hawaii.
The whole thing is a huge swell, the upwelling of life.
In the equatorial upwelling zone, there is very little seasonal change in phytoplankton productivity.
On Earth, sea-floor spreading is fuelled by molten rock upwelling from deep inside the Earth.
